privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated tax data for a fictitious individual, Julian Blackwood. The $215,000 T4 income, $30,000 Canadian Exploration Expense (CEE) via T101, and $1,450 Schedule 4 interest are explicitly detailed in the prompt instructions and the task verifier. The Federal Investment Tax Credit of $9,000 is mathematically derived from the $30,000 CEE using the 30% Critical Mineral Exploration Tax Credit (CMETC) rate for 2024. The Provincial Investment Tax Credit of $1,500 is mathematically derived from the 5% Ontario Focused Flow-Through Share Tax Credit rate for 2024. The expected save path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julian_blackwood.24t.
